data.interval_high: High priority interval (s) — power, voltage, current
data.interval_low: Low priority interval (s) — signal, warnings, errors
data.interval_very_low: Very low priority interval (s) — firmware, serial number

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Peblar charger. Check the IP address and port.

abort.already_configured: This Peblar charger is already configured.

state.E: Error (short to PE or powered off)
